title: Index includes archived change records as spec'd area
body: The spec index builder is picking up requirements from openspec/changes/archive/ and treating closed features as still under active spec guard. Need to exclude archive subdirectory.
_note: Tests paraphrase: the bug uses 'archived change records' / 'archive subdirectory' against a requirement that talks about 'exclude the archive directory'. Low keyword overlap, high semantic overlap.

title: Same input yields different similarity scores on rerun
body: Two consecutive runs of classify_bugs.py on the same corpus produce different output JSON bytes. The cosine similarity scoring isn't reproducible.
_note: Tests cross-vocab: 'cosine similarity scoring isn't reproducible' against the requirement's 'Score ... deterministically'.

title: Stop hook lets agent stop without verification or wakeup
body: The continuation harness stop barrier should require either verification_passed, wakeup_registered, or user_released. Currently the gate fails to block on no-completion-no-resumption.
_note: Multiple plausible matches — passing if any of the three is hit.

title: Add dark mode toggle to settings panel
body: User can toggle between light and dark themes. Persist preference in localStorage.
_note: Pure UI feature — no overlap with continuation-harness or staleness specs.

title: Update CSS variable for primary button hover
body: Change --button-primary-hover from #0066cc to #0055aa. Visual tweak only.
_note: Cosmetic change — should classify as 'out' with no requirements matching above threshold.

title: Build the embedding index from spec markdown files
body: Need a script that walks openspec/changes/ and parses Requirement blocks, producing vector embeddings for each requirement.
_note: Direct keyword match — the easy case.
